ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model (e.g., reciprocal_relations_model, cp) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was created */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was last updated */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  "author" TEXT /* Name of the researcher who created the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset was created */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset was last updated */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the dataset in bytes */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "jobs" (
  "job_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being trained */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset used for training */,
  "job_type" TEXT /* Type of the job (e.g., search, train) */,
  "split" TEXT /* Split of the data (e.g., valid, test) */,
  "epoch" INTEGER /* Number of epochs for training */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the job was created */,
  "started_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the job started */,
  "ended_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the job ended */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the job */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the job */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_jobs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_jobs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_jobs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hyperparameters" (
  "hyperparameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hyperparameter */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job that the hyperparameter belongs to */,
  "hyperparameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the hyperparameter (e.g., reciprocal, batch_size) */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the hyperparameter */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the hyperparameter was created */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the hyperparameter was last updated */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the hyperparameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hyperparameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hyperparameters_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES jobs ("job_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job that the metric belongs to */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., mean_reciprocal_rank_filtered_with_test) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was created */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was last updated */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES jobs ("job_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lookup_embedders" (
  "embedder_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each embedder */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job that the embedder belongs to */,
  "dim" INTEGER /* Dimensionality of the embedder */,
  "initialize" TEXT /* Initialization method for the embedder */,
  "initialize_args" TEXT /* Arguments for initialization */,
  "regularize" TEXT /* Regularization method for the embedder */,
  "regularize_args" TEXT /* Arguments for regularization */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the embedder was created */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the embedder was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the embedder */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("embedder_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lookup_embedders_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES jobs ("job_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "entity_embedders" (
  "embedder_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each embedder */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job that the embedder belongs to */,
  "regularize_weight" REAL /* Weight for regularization */,
  "dropout" REAL /* Dropout rate for the embedder */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the embedder was created */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the embedder was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the embedder */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("embedder_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_entity_embedders_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES jobs ("job_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "relation_embedders" (
  "embedder_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each embedder */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job that the embedder belongs to */,
  "regularize_weight" REAL /* Weight for regularization */,
  "dropout" REAL /* Dropout rate for the embedder */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the embedder was created */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the embedder was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the embedder */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("embedder_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_relation_embedders_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES jobs ("job_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
